hero.title: Automotive market research that keeps pace with your product decisions.
hero.subtitle: From product clinics and customer journeys to dealer and customer satisfaction programmes: we support the automotive industry with research that turns market feedback into clear decisions.

performance.title: Reliable delivery, from kick-off to final report.
performance.subtitle: Automotive timelines are demanding. Our project teams combine fast turnaround with strict quality standards, so results arrive when decisions are made – not after.

cards.title: On-time project delivery
cards.text: Clear project plans, close coordination and proactive communication keep every study on track – even when timings shift on the client side.

cards.title: Speed without shortcuts
cards.text: Lean structures and short decision paths let us set up, field and analyse automotive studies quickly while keeping the methodology sound.

cards.title: Consistent quality standards
cards.text: Standardised quality checks across questionnaires, fieldwork and data preparation deliver results you can confidently present to any board.

performance.footnote: All project steps, from study design through to reporting, are handled by one dedicated team.

customers.title: Partners to manufacturers, importers and dealer networks.
customers.subtitle: We support automotive companies along the entire value chain – from headquarters to national sales companies and retail organisations, in home markets and internationally.

groups.title: Manufacturers (OEMs)
groups.text: Product, brand and satisfaction research for headquarters functions – from early concept evaluation to continuous customer and dealer feedback programmes.

groups.title: Importers & sales companies
groups.text: Market-specific studies that translate central strategies into local insights and account for the specifics of each country and sales region.

groups.title: Dealer networks
groups.text: Customer and dealer satisfaction programmes that show how sales and service are experienced on the ground – outlet by outlet, region by region.

customers.logos_caption: A selection of brands that trust our work

methods.title: Quantitative and qualitative – always tailored to the question.
methods.subtitle: We combine proven research methods into study designs that fit your decision, your target group and your timeline.

items.title: Quantitative surveys
items.text: CATI and online interviews with drivers, owners and prospects – robust samples, careful screening and structured questionnaires deliver measurable, comparable results.

items.title: Qualitative research
items.text: In-depth interviews and group discussions uncover the motives behind the numbers: how customers think about brands, vehicles and services in their own words.

items.title: Customer journey analyses
items.text: We map the path from first contact through purchase, service and repurchase – identifying the touchpoints that shape decisions and where experiences break down.

items.title: Mystery elements
items.text: Mystery calls, visits and enquiries complement survey data with an outside-in view of how sales and service processes actually perform.

methods.footnote: Methods are combined into one study design, so results from different sources tell a single, consistent story.

car_clinics.title: Product clinics that put your vehicle in front of the customers who matter.
car_clinics.paragraph_1: In car clinics, target customers evaluate vehicle concepts, designs and prototypes under controlled conditions – long before market launch. Interior and exterior, haptics, functionality and perceived value are assessed in direct comparison with relevant competitors.
car_clinics.paragraph_2: We handle the complete setup: recruiting the right participants, designing the evaluation programme, running the fieldwork on site and condensing the results into clear recommendations for product and marketing decisions.

cards.title: Static clinics
cards.text: Participants experience vehicles or models standing still – seating, ergonomics, material impressions and design are evaluated in detail and compared with competitor vehicles.

cards.title: Dynamic clinics
cards.text: Test drives add the driving experience: acceleration, handling, comfort and assistance features are assessed in realistic usage situations.

cards.title: Prototype & concept feedback
cards.text: Early feedback on prototypes, mock-ups and concept descriptions shows which features convince target customers – and where concepts should be sharpened before launch.
